hours.title: Office hours
hours.answer: We're open 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday through Saturday. We're closed Sundays.

location.title: Location
location.answer: Our practice is at 123 Smile Street, Suite 200. Free parking is available in the lot behind the building.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.answer: We accept most major PPO plans. Bring your insurance card to your visit; we can verify benefits before treatment when possible.

self_pay.title: Self-pay / no insurance
self_pay.answer: We offer transparent pricing for self-pay patients and can discuss payment options at booking or check-in.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.answer: We recommend booking in advance, but we do our best to accommodate same-day or urgent visits when possible.

emergency.title: Emergency care
emergency.answer: If you're experiencing a dental emergency, we’ll prioritize getting you seen as soon as possible. Please let us know what’s going on.
